TO26 · Figure review & fact-check

Figure & value reference

This portal brings the data and figures from the rural transitions study to life. It renders every figure directly from the pipeline outputs (figure_data/out/) in their respective study order, interspersed with relevant excerpts from the draft text.

Use the sticky switch at the top to toggle the underlying similarity metric between Cosine (the authors' original stated metric) and Euclidean (our per-source-normalized alternative). When toggled, all metric-dependent figures re-render instantly, and the accompanying draft text updates to reflect the accurate data under that scenario.
